subcodes.first_line: The essence of praise and the quintessence of glorification beseem and are worthy of the people of Bahá, for the riches, adornments and colors of the mortal realm... most among the princes and rulers outwardly manifest love [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حقیقت مدح و جوهر ثنا اهل بها را لایق و سزا که ثروت و زینت و الوان ناسوت... اکثری از امرا و رؤسا در ظاهر اظهار محبت
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @contention and conflict, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @wisdom [hikmat]
